scope: Explicit source decisions for duplicate stock names and compiler-generated entry points

_inline_copy_from_user@0010a5c8.basis: Explicit shared reconstruction of the GKI 6.12 uaccess helper body reached by eight stock callers and matched exactly against the stock AArch64 body

init_module@0013159c.basis: module_init(zte_touch_init) emits the ELF init_module entry point

syna_pal_mem_cpy@0011d67c.basis: First duplicate occurrence; 104-byte stock body aligns with the base variant

syna_pal_mem_cpy@0011da1c.basis: Second duplicate occurrence; 84-byte stock body aligns with variant _0

syna_pal_mem_cpy@0012a478.basis: Third duplicate occurrence; 116-byte stock body aligns with variant _1

syna_pal_mem_free@001284c0.basis: First duplicate occurrence and base source variant

syna_pal_mem_free@0012a4ec.basis: Second duplicate occurrence and source variant _0

syna_tcm_buf_alloc@0011d594.basis: First duplicate occurrence; 232-byte stock body aligns with the base variant

syna_tcm_buf_alloc@0011d940.basis: Second duplicate occurrence; 220-byte stock body aligns with variant _0

syna_tcm_buf_copy@0011ce6c.basis: First 640-byte duplicate occurrence and base source variant

syna_tcm_buf_copy@0011dce4.basis: Second 640-byte duplicate occurrence and source variant _0

syna_tcm_buf_copy@0011e454.basis: Third 640-byte duplicate occurrence and source variant _1

syna_tcm_buf_copy@00121c10.basis: Only 832-byte duplicate occurrence; aligns with the larger source variant _2

syna_tcm_buf_unlock@0011ee40.basis: First duplicate occurrence and base source variant

syna_tcm_buf_unlock@00122140.basis: Second duplicate occurrence and source variant _0

syna_tcm_testing_check_frame_data@0011d0.basis: First duplicate occurrence and base source variant

syna_tcm_testing_check_frame_data@0011e6.basis: Second duplicate occurrence and source variant _0
